release_notes: **Content-aware column widths** — every table column now sizes to `max(proportional_target, header_text_fit, widest_cell_fit)` at the active font, so headers and model names are ALWAYS fully visible at any zoom level. Applied to matrix, inventory, transactions, and admin tables.; **Per-item font scaling** — matrix items with individual `setFont` (`_FONT_MODEL` 11pt, `_FONT_COLOR` 9pt, `_FONT_BRAND` 12pt, `_FONT_DATA` 10pt, `_FONT_MONO` 11pt) now scale correctly via a new `BASE_PT_ROLE` marker that remembers each item's 100% point size; **Real-time live zoom on slider drag** — every slider tick applies zoom through the 16 ms coalescer; drag feels instant with no lag
